title: Port ts_parser__compare_versions and fix Merge link ordering
description: Dynamic precedence fix (65c6252) improves results but deviates from C reference in 2 ways: (1) Merge link swap - C tracks max prec on StackNode, doesn't reorder links. (2) condenseStack - C uses pair-wise ts_parser__compare_versions, our code uses a search loop. Port the C comparison logic for full correctness. Reviewer analysis in 0767a583.
